 {'date': '2026-03-12 10:06:47',
  'headline': '5 Must-Read Analyst Questions From AerSale’s Q4 Earnings Call',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'AerSale’s fourth quarter results were met with a significant '
             'negative market reaction, as both revenue and adjusted earnings '
             'fell short of Wall Street’s expectations. Management attributed '

             'which can be volatile from quarter to quarter, while '
             'highlighting growth in more predictable segments such as '
             'component maintenance, used serviceable materials (USM), and '
             'leasing. CEO Nicolas Finazzo pointed to improvements in '
             'operating margin, d',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/5-must-read-analyst-questions-100647394.html'},

  'headline': '3 Stocks Under $10 We Keep Off Our Radar',
